recent_excerpts: ZDI disclosed CVE-2026-24032, a 7.3-CVSS authentication bypass in Siemens SINEC NMS that requires no authentication to exploit. Affects industrial network management systems.
Axonius has updated its Asset Cloud platform with AI-powered remediation for exposures, added IoT/OT asset management, and introduced an asset trust standard to quantify security posture.

Security researchers propose extending two-factor authentication (2FA) principles to physical access control systems for critical infrastructure, creating a hybrid defense against credential-based att
